content.speakerText: I got you something—hope you like it!
content.speakerTextCn: 我给你带了礼物，希望你喜欢！

options.text: Oh my gosh, you shouldn't have! It's perfect!
Is this really for me? I didn't expect anything.
It's nice, but I already have one.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了收到礼物时的惊喜与礼貌感谢，符合英语文化中对赠礼的积极回应。选项2过于平淡，缺乏情感回应；选项3虽然礼貌但不够自然，且未表达对礼物的欣赏；选项4直接否定礼物价值，显得不礼貌。

content.speakerText: I picked this out especially for you because I know how much you love coffee.
content.speakerTextCn: 我特意为你挑了这个，因为我知道你有多爱咖啡。

options.text: Wow, this is so thoughtful! Thank you so much!
Oh, I don't drink coffee anymore.
You didn't have to spend money on me.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对对方用心的感激，符合赠礼场景的积极回应。选项2直接否定礼物用途，伤感情；选项3虽看似礼貌，但可能让送礼者感到内疚；选项4语气冷淡，缺乏真诚。

content.speakerText: Happy birthday! I hope you enjoy this little gift.
content.speakerTextCn: 生日快乐！希望你喜欢这份小礼物。

options.text: This is too much! I'm so touched—thank you!
I'll put it on my shelf.
Do I have to open it now?
It's okay, I was hoping for something bigger.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了真诚的感动与感谢，符合英语文化中对生日礼物的得体回应。选项2过于冷漠；选项3显得不耐烦；选项4直接表达不满，极不礼貌。

content.hint: 这是收到礼物时表达惊讶和谦逊的经典句型
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（shouldn't have 表示‘你太客气了’）

content.template: I picked this out ___ you because I know how much you love ___.
content.hint: 表达‘为你挑选’和‘因为你喜欢它’的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（pick out for sb）和代词指代

content.template: Thank you so much—this is so ___!
content.hint: 形容礼物体现用心时最常用的形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频形容词（thoughtful 表达‘用心’）

content.speakerText: I got you something—hope you like it!
content.speakerTextCn: 我给你带了礼物，希望你喜欢！
expectedAnswers: Oh my gosh, you shouldn't have! It's perfect!
Aw, thanks so much—I'm so touched!
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达了惊喜或感动（意图达成度）
是否使用了恰当的礼貌表达（如 shouldn't have, thanks so much）（语言准确性）
语气是否自然真诚，符合英语口语习惯（表达自然度）

content.speakerText: I made this cake for you—it's not fancy, but I hope you like it.
content.speakerTextCn: 我为你做了这个蛋糕，虽然不华丽，但希望你喜欢。
expectedAnswers: You didn't have to bake this, but thank you—it looks amazing!
This is so sweet of you! I can't wait to try it!
Wow, you're the best! I'm so grateful!
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了对方的谦逊表达并给予积极反馈（意图达成度）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'sweet of you', 'grateful', 'didn't have to'（关键词覆盖）
语气是否温暖自然，避免冷淡或抱怨（表达自然度）

content.speakerText: Happy holidays! I got you a little something.
content.speakerTextCn: 节日快乐！我给你带了点小礼物。
expectedAnswers: Aww, you're so kind! Thank you!
I didn't expect anything—I'm really touched!
This is so thoughtful! I'll treasure it!
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达了恰当的惊喜与感激（意图达成度）
是否使用了节日或赠礼场景的地道表达（如 'thoughtful', 'treasure it'）（语言准确性）
是否避免了负面或冷漠回应（如 'It's too small'）（表达自然度）
